$comment: Family Germany/France/Switzerland 2026 trip. 2 adults + twin 6-year-olds. Kid-friendly, Rick Steves-style pacing. v4: Colmar address confirmed (12 Rue de l'Ange), parking plan set (Saint-Josse). v3: flights + car + Linderhof booked.

trip.name: Europe Family Trip 2026
trip.description: Fifteen-day family road trip: Germany → France → Switzerland → Bavaria. Two adults with 6-year-old twins. One rental car for the whole trip. Rick Steves-style pacing — big highlights, real downtime, no death marches.
style_notes: Kid-friendly pacing — mornings for anchors, afternoons for downtime.
Build in reset points: playgrounds, ice cream stops, hotel time.
One car kept the whole trip. Generally park it and don't move it.
Never over-schedule. Locked reservations first, then flexible time.
Rain / meltdown pivots pre-identified where possible.

stops.notes: Arrival & recovery. Jul 26 intentionally loose — jet lag buffer before the long drive to Colmar on the 27th. Not a sightseeing stop; expectations low.

parking.primary: Premier Inn onsite parking (~€15/night, chargeable, cannot be reserved)

backups.name: Tiefgarage Innenhafen
backups.verify: hours, overnight access, Sunday availability, rates

parking.instruction: Arrive at Premier Inn and try onsite first. If full, use Innenhafen / Altstadt garages — don't circle for street parking.

stops.notes: Half-timbered old town, Little Venice, canals. Three nights. Jul 28 is the slow reset day; Jul 29 is Haut-Koenigsbourg + Strasbourg. Parent wine reward while kids do ice cream + wandering.

lodging.name: Chez Miriam Cecile et Caroline
lodging.address: 12 Rue de l'Ange, 1er étage, 68000 Colmar, France
lodging.notes: Dead center of old town, ~2 blocks from cathedral. 1er étage = one flight up (US 2nd floor). VERIFY: elevator or stairs-only with luggage. VERIFY: Miriam's arrival-day check-in instructions (key handoff, contact number, arrival window).

parking.primary: Parking Saint-Josse (Rue Saint-Josse) — €3/day, first hour free, 24/7, 5-min walk. Recommended for 3-night stay (~€9 total).

backups.name: Parking Rapp
backups.note: Free after 7pm and Sundays. ~5-10 min walk. Daytime often full.

parking.instruction: Arrival plan: pull as close to 12 Rue de l'Ange as pedestrian zone allows, drop luggage briefly (confirm with Miriam), then park at Saint-Josse for the stay. Leave car parked all 3 nights — everything is walkable, and Jul 29 uses car for Haut-Koenigsbourg/Strasbourg only.
warnings: Rue de l'Ange is in Colmar's pedestrian zone — driving to the door may be restricted or time-limited. Confirm arrival procedure with Miriam.
Avoid Parking de la Mairie — closes Sundays and at 9pm.

stops.notes: Chapel Bridge, Old Town, Lake Lucerne. Pilatus Golden Round Trip day on Jul 31. Car stays parked at the apartment the whole stay — do Pilatus without moving the car.

parking.primary: Parking spot at apartment — confirmed and handled
parking.instruction: Park on arrival Jul 30. Leave car for entire stay. Load and depart morning of Aug 1.

stops.notes: Storybook town at the foot of the Alps. Aug 2 is exterior-only Neuschwanstein — no interior tickets, Linderhof on Aug 3 covers the Ludwig palace interior. Marienbrücke + Alpsee are the anchors.

parking.primary: RESOLVE — hotel parking details not yet confirmed
parking.instruction: Working assumption: use Hotel Sonne as base, drive to Hohenschwangau for Neuschwanstein exterior day.

stops.notes: Schönau am Königssee area. Arrival via Linderhof + Oberammergau on the transfer day. Aug 4 is the big Königssee boat day — all the way to Salet/Obersee with a stop at St. Bartholomä.

parking.primary: RESOLVE — hotel parking details not yet confirmed
parking.instruction: Working assumption: leave car parked at hotel Aug 4, walk to Königssee boat dock.

stops.notes: Arrive evening of Aug 5 via Eagle's Nest + Salt Mine transfer day. Full day Aug 6: Viktualienmarkt, Marienplatz, Glockenspiel, Residenz (highlight visit, not deep-dive), English Garden. Rain pivot: Deutsches Museum Kids' Kingdom.

parking.primary: Parkgarage Schrannenhalle — closest to hotel, best with kids + luggage (~€40/day)

backups.name: Isarparkhaus / München Isartor Isarparkhaus
backups.verify: current rate, availability, height clearance, walking route

parking.instruction: Use Schrannenhalle as primary arrival garage Aug 5 unless height/price/availability push to Isarparkhaus.
warnings: Confirm rental car has green Umweltplakette (environmental sticker) before driving into Munich's low-emission zone.
Verify Schrannenhalle current rate, height clearance, overnight rules, payment before arrival.

activities.title: Duisburg flexible / recovery day
activities.notes: Intentionally loose. Jet-lag buffer before the long drive on Jul 27. No major sightseeing. TBD midday activity.

activities.title: Heidelberg Castle stop en route
activities.notes: Funicular up, castle courtyard/views. Great Barrel or Apothecary Museum if easy. DECIDE: guided interior tour vs exterior/funicular-only. One long stop on the Duisburg → Colmar drive.

activities.title: Colmar old town wander (Little Venice, canals)
activities.notes: Little Venice, canals, half-timbered streets, Ancienne Douane area. Kid reset with ice cream / snack / playground after.

activities.title: Wine tasting under the arches (Ancienne Douane)
activities.notes: VERIFY: mini wine tasting is running on this date. Parent reward while kids do easy wandering.

activities.title: Haut-Koenigsbourg Castle
activities.notes: VERIFY: tickets / opening details. Use 'In Search of the Lost Memory' booklet / family castle mission if available.

activities.title: Strasbourg Cathedral
activities.notes: Before Batorama boat tour.

activities.title: Petite France / light Strasbourg wander
activities.notes: Only if kid energy allows after Batorama.

activities.title: Lucerne evening walk (Lion Monument, Chapel Bridge, lakefront)
activities.notes: Light arrival day. No major paid attraction.

activities.title: Pilatus Golden Round Trip
activities.notes: Boat from Pier 2 (target 9:38 AM) → cogwheel up → summit (Dragon Path / viewpoints) → Dragon Ride down to Fräkmüntegg → luge if operating and kid-approved → panorama gondolas to Kriens → bus/taxi/walk back. Car stays parked at apartment. No Swiss Travel Pass planned. DECIDE tickets ahead vs weather-day. DECIDE Dragon Path only vs Tomlishorn.

activities.title: Skywalk Allgäu
activities.notes: Treetop walk, adventure playgrounds, nature trail. Lunch at/near Skywalk. Primary stop on the Lucerne → Füssen transfer day. VERIFY hours. DECIDE: tickets ahead vs day-of.

activities.title: Füssen old town walk
activities.notes: Relaxed arrival-day walk.

activities.title: Marienbrücke viewpoint (Neuschwanstein classic photo)
activities.notes: Shuttle up if operating. VERIFY: Hohenschwangau parking + shuttle details.

activities.title: Neuschwanstein exterior walk
activities.notes: Exterior only — NOT relying on same-day interior tickets. Linderhof interior on Aug 3 fills that gap.

activities.title: Alpsee / Hohenschwangau lakefront wander
activities.notes: Kid-friendly lakefront.

activities.title: Füssen old town / Lech River downtime
activities.notes: Recovery time before dinner.

activities.title: Linderhof Palace tour
activities.notes: 9:25 AM tour — BOOKED. Gardens + photos after. Skip Venus Grotto (available time too late). Preferred over Zugspitze. VERIFY parking / arrival buffer on the day.

activities.title: Oberammergau painted-house walk
activities.notes: Lunch + short painted-house walk. Not museum-heavy.

activities.title: Königssee boat to Salet + Obersee walk
activities.notes: 8:15 walk from hotel to dock. 8:30 boat to Salet. 9:30–11:30 Obersee walk. 11:30 boat back with stop at St. Bartholomä. 12:00–1:30 lunch at St. Bartholomä. 1:30–2:30 return boat. Return mid-afternoon to avoid peak return pressure. VERIFY boat schedule.

activities.title: Eagle's Nest (Kehlsteinhaus) visit
activities.notes: 9:20 bus up (booked), 11:00 bus down (booked). Views, photos, short walk. VERIFY parking + arrival procedure at bus area. Leave hotel by 8:20 AM.

activities.title: Berchtesgaden Salt Mine tour
activities.notes: 1:20 PM tour (booked). VERIFY check-in timing.

activities.title: Viktualienmarkt + Marienplatz + Frauenkirche exterior
activities.notes: Classic morning walk before Glockenspiel.

activities.title: Glockenspiel (Marienplatz)
activities.notes: Position by 10:30. Kids will love this.

activities.title: Munich Residenz (highlight visit)
activities.notes: Highlight visit — NOT a full deep-dive. Chosen over Nymphenburg. DECIDE: tickets ahead vs day-of.

activities.title: English Garden + Eisbach surfers
activities.notes: Kids love the Eisbach surfers. DECIDE: walk / taxi / transit to get there.

activities.title: Deutsches Museum Kids' Kingdom (rain/meltdown pivot)
activities.notes: Backup plan for Aug 6 if weather or kid energy demands. Not scheduled.

activities.title: TBD LUNCH — Duisburg
activities.notes: Arrival day. Keep simple.

activities.title: TBD LUNCH — Oberammergau (candidate: Hotel Alte Post)
activities.notes: Candidate: Hotel Alte Post.

activities.title: TBD DINNER — Königssee (candidate: Seerestaurant Echostüberl)
activities.notes: Candidate: Seerestaurant Echostüberl.

activities.title: TBD DINNER — Berchtesgaden (candidate: Gasthaus zum Bier-Adam)
activities.notes: Candidate: Gasthaus zum Bier-Adam. DECIDE: drive or taxi to dinner.

activities.title: TBD LUNCH — Berchtesgaden (candidate: Gasthof Neuhaus)
activities.notes: Between Eagle's Nest and Salt Mine. Candidate: Gasthof Neuhaus.

reservations.name: DL 1701 — SMF → MSP (outbound leg 1)
reservations.notes: Fri Jul 24, 2026. Sacramento (SMF) → Minneapolis/St. Paul (MSP). Terminal A at SMF. VERIFY exact departure/arrival times from Delta e-ticket.

reservations.name: DL 162 — MSP → AMS (outbound leg 2, transatlantic)
reservations.notes: Fri Jul 24 → Sat Jul 25, 2026. Minneapolis/St. Paul (MSP) → Amsterdam Schiphol (AMS). Overnight transatlantic. VERIFY departure and arrival times.

reservations.name: DL 9229 — AMS → DUS (outbound leg 3)
reservations.notes: Sat Jul 25, 2026. Amsterdam (AMS) → Düsseldorf (DUS). Short connection flight, operated by KLM Cityhopper. Arrival airport is DUS — Duisburg is ~30 km / 30 min drive. VERIFY departure and arrival times.

reservations.name: DL 131 — MUC → ATL (return leg 1, transatlantic)
reservations.notes: Fri Aug 7, 2026. Munich (MUC) → Atlanta (ATL). VERIFY departure time — drives Munich airport arrival target and rental car return timing.

reservations.name: DL 743 — ATL → SMF (return leg 2)
reservations.notes: Fri Aug 7, 2026. Atlanta (ATL) → Sacramento (SMF). Final leg home. VERIFY arrival time.

reservations.name: Hertz rental car (whole trip)
reservations.notes: One car for the entire trip. Pickup: Hertz at Düsseldorf Airport (DUS) after DL 9229 arrival. Drop-off: Hertz at Munich Airport (MUC) morning of Aug 7 before DL 131. VERIFY: green Umweltplakette (required for Munich low-emission zone). CONFIRM: Swiss vignette included or need to buy separately at border (~€40).

reservations.name: Premier Inn Duisburg City Altstadt
reservations.notes: Oberstraße 2, 47051 Duisburg. 2 nights. Parking chargeable onsite ~€15/night, cannot be reserved. Backups: Tiefgarage Innenhafen, Parkplatz Burgplatz.

reservations.name: Chez Miriam Cecile et Caroline
reservations.notes: 12 Rue de l'Ange, 1er étage, 68000 Colmar. 3 nights. Center of old town, one flight up. Parking: Saint-Josse (€3/day, 5-min walk). VERIFY: elevator, Miriam's arrival contact info, and pedestrian-zone drop-off procedure.

reservations.name: VRBO apartment — Weystrasse 13
reservations.notes: Weystrasse 13, 6006 Luzern. 2 nights. Parking spot at apartment confirmed.

reservations.name: Hotel Sonne
reservations.notes: Füssen old town. 2 nights. RESOLVE: parking details, reservation need, cost, luggage drop-off.

reservations.name: Hotel Königsseer Hof
reservations.notes: Königssee / Schönau am Königssee. 2 nights. RESOLVE: parking availability, whether car can stay parked Aug 4, walk time to boat dock.

reservations.name: Hotel am Viktualienmarkt
reservations.notes: Utzschneiderstraße 14, 80469 München. 2 nights. Parking plan: Parkgarage Schrannenhalle (primary, ~€40/day) or Isarparkhaus (backup, ~€20/24h).

reservations.name: Batorama Red Tour (Strasbourg)
reservations.notes: Standard Red Tour, NOT the Parliament disembarkation tour. Arrive dock by 2:15 PM.

reservations.name: Pilatus Golden Round Trip
reservations.notes: Boat + cogwheel + gondola combo. DECIDE: buy ahead or wait for weather. Target 9:38 AM boat from Pier 2. No Swiss Travel Pass planned. VERIFY boat/cogwheel/gondola schedule. VERIFY Fräkmüntegg luge operation.

reservations.name: Skywalk Allgäu
reservations.notes: DECIDE: buy ahead or day-of. VERIFY hours.

reservations.name: Linderhof Palace tour
reservations.notes: 9:25 AM tour — BOOKED. Preferred over Zugspitze. Skip Venus Grotto (too late). VERIFY parking + arrival buffer on the day.

reservations.name: Eagle's Nest bus (Kehlsteinhaus)
reservations.notes: 9:20 AM up, 11:00 AM down. Fixed anchor. VERIFY parking + arrival procedure at bus area.

reservations.name: Berchtesgaden Salt Mine tour
reservations.notes: Fixed anchor after lunch. VERIFY check-in timing.

reservations.name: Munich Residenz
reservations.notes: Highlight visit, not deep-dive. DECIDE: tickets ahead vs day-of.

reservations.name: NOAH'S Pizzeria (Munich arrival dinner)
reservations.notes: Arrival-night dinner in Munich. Kid-friendly.

reservations.name: Brenner Grill (Munich final dinner)
reservations.notes: Final trip dinner.

meal_placeholders_summary.note: All TBD meals are captured as activities with kind='meal'. Candidates noted where applicable.

weather_notes.summary: Heat wave broke earlier this week — pattern shifted 15-20°F cooler with rain. Trip window (Jul 24+) just entering reliable forecast range. Pattern favors cool/wet over hot/dry. Re-check with fresh forecast now that we're 6 days out.

reminders: Add confirmation numbers to all booked reservations (flights, hotels, Linderhof, Eagle's Nest, Salt Mine, restaurants)
Verify green Umweltplakette on Hertz car before Munich (low-emission zone)

Re-check weather now that we're inside the 10-day forecast window
